title: Ban a slug for the rest of the session after per-slug dollar loss cap is hit
acceptance:
- Further entries on a slug are blocked after the slug reaches the configured session loss cap
- Threshold is configurable via .env
- Rejection is logged in standard gate format
- No files outside allowed scope modified
- python -m py_compile bot_core.py passes
- python -m py_compile core/risk.py passes if modified
